overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person action-adventure game showing a character standing on a coastal cliff edge overlooking a vast turquoise ocean. The character raises their hand toward the horizon before the camera slowly pans left to reveal towering natural rock formations and cliff faces along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking open ocean

events.description: character raises right hand toward the horizon in a gesture

agents.ego_description: standing still on the cliff edge, gazing out at the ocean, then raising right hand toward the horizon

entered.detail: vast expanse of turquoise water stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
gray rocky ledge where the character stands, dropping off to the water below
hazy mountain silhouette visible on the horizon to the right

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge facing a vast open ocean under a clear blue sky. The water displays vibrant turquoise hues, and a distant island is visible on the horizon. The character raises their hand in a gesture toward the sea while the camera begins a slow leftward pan.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff with towering rock formations

events.description: camera pans left to reveal massive cliff faces and rock formations along the coastline

agents.ego_description: slowly turning to face left along the cliff edge, revealing the coastal rock structures

entered.detail: massive vertical stone cliff wall rising from the water, showing layered rock strata
tall isolated rock towers and arch formations extending from the main cliff

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the open ocean view transitions to reveal towering coastal cliffs and dramatic rock formations. The massive stone structures rise vertically from the water, creating a semi-enclosed feeling. The ocean remains visible to the right while the character surveys the rugged cliffside architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, open vista of the ocean to a dramatic view of towering coastal cliffs. It begins with a character standing on a rocky cliff edge, raising a hand toward a vast turquoise sea and a distant island under a clear blue sky. As the camera begins a slow leftward pan, the expansive horizon gradually gives way to massive stone structures rising vertically from the water. The scene then shifts from the openness of the sea to a more enclosed perspective, revealing rugged rock formations and dramatic cliffside architecture. Finally, the camera settles on these towering cliffs while the ocean remains visible to the right, completing the survey of the shoreline.
